allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const content = fs.readFileSync\(''D:/Me/Sen/js/patterns-data.js'', ''utf8''\); console.log\(''File size:'', content.length, ''bytes''\); console.log\(''Lines:'', content.split\(''\\n''\).length\); try { eval\(content.replace\(''const PATTERNS_DATA'', ''var PATTERNS_DATA''\).replace\(''const PATTERN_STATS'', ''var PATTERN_STATS''\).replace\(''const PHASES_DATA'', ''var PHASES_DATA''\).replace\(''function getPatternOfTheDay'', ''var getPatternOfTheDay = function''\)\); console.log\(''PATTERNS_DATA length:'', PATTERNS_DATA.length\); console.log\(''Parse: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''Parse error:'', e.message\); }")
